Spell Research Kit  
 


This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 4.0 Weight Reduction: 0%
Capacity: 10 Size Capacity: LARGE
Spell Research Kit

This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 4.0 Weight Reduction: 0%
Capacity: 10 Size Capacity: LARGE

Item Lore:A kit of various tool used for making spells
Item Type:Container
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:10 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:10
Lucy Entry By:Fleven
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 09:58:30
Page Updated:Wed Sep 11th, 2024

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Merchants | Quests | Comments ]

Merchants


Vendor listing - Premium only

This item is used in quests.

Corathus Creep
Quest Name
Parts for Bellfast (research)

Crescent Reach (Removed)

Level restriction

# Jun 06 2021 at 2:42 PM Rating: Decent
mfogell
View User Forum
Scholar
67 posts
FYI,
Not sure about other classes, but Nec's can't do Research until Lvl 16.
Druids apparently can't use the Research kit or the Concordance container. (no clue how to advance a Druid) :(
▲ Page top
Can't Use
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2012 at 10:17 AM Rating: Decent
pintoy
View User Forum
Sage
69 posts
Agreed. Would be nice to list the classes that can't use this. Druids can't either.

Fendy
▲ Page top
Spell research kit post Timelocked era
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2011 at 3:14 PM Rating: Good
snailish
4,580 posts
West Freeport, in the first turn of the hall of the Academy of Arcane Sciences building.

/loc of the half-elf female "spell research merchant" that has the spell research kits (melee, priest, etc.) is +114.60, -886.30

Other (male) merchants with the same name have inks, etc. and are in the same area.


I'm assuming this was put in so all of us playing Timelocked progression would be able to research our lowbie spells prior to Planes of Power. If these merchants have always been there... shrugs.

Edit: Just ran into Dark elf versions of the same merchants in Neriak Commons at the Int caster guild building. Going to assume they are in several other locations as well.

Edited, Feb 20th 2011 5:28pm by snailish
▲ Page top

cant use
QuoteReply
# May 10 2010 at 12:03 AM Rating: Decent
sodguild
Scholar
90 posts
No Melee class especially those classes that use only Tomes can use this kit. It pretty much sucks as the only way for us (Monks) to skill up in Research is to 1 - Make Manuals and 2 - Be RICH! It will take approximately 2 Mil Plat to GM this tradeskill, if you are lucky. Don't know about you, but I do not have that kinda dough! Good luck.
____________________________
"Insanity is doing the same thing over and over and expecting different results"

# Feb 18 2006 at 11:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592280397028
15 posts
Also sold from enchanter supplies NPC @ loc 1054, -1009
▲ Page top
RE: Ak'anon
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2006 at 3:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592254807460
43 posts
This information is inaccurate. I'm not saying you didn't buy one there, it's possible (however unlikely) that some other player sold one to that vendor. I think it's more likely you are thinking of the Tome of Endless Enchantments which IS sold by this vendor. The Spell Research Kit is something entirely different and is not part of this vendor's regular inventory.
▲ Page top
Combines
QuoteReply
# Nov 16 2005 at 8:56 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591786452832
View User Forum
Guru
324 posts
This Spell Research Kit does not do level 60 and below spells.

It is used in researching level 61 - 65 spells and is also used in the Parts for Bellfast quest. Used to combine certain combinations of Mechanoinstruction Scraps.

QuoteReply
# Sep 17 2005 at 9:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592766213586
View User Forum
Scholar
26 posts
I purchased this "kit" today---only its not a kit...its a combine container to do research combines in. I also purchased all the research books and what a NITEMARE!!! they don't tell you directly what spells you can make--you have to figure it out with the clues given so if someone figures this out PLEASE post your findings here. Greatly appreciated !!!!
